task_completion.description: Open the SRS document in the ReqView application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'SRS' document is visible in the main view, indicated by a tab or document title.

task_completion.description: Select the top-level requirement in the SRS document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The first or top-level requirement in the document hierarchy is highlighted or actively selected.

task_completion.description: Open the Discussion or Comment panel for the selected requirement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A panel labeled 'Discussion', 'Comments', or similar is open and associated with the selected top-level requirement.

task_completion.description: Enter the required comment text into the input field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Acceptance criteria are missing for this requirement. The testing team needs measurable pass/fail conditions before this can be approved. Please update by end of sprint 12.' is visible in the comment input box.

task_completion.description: Submit and save the comment to the requirement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The comment appears as a submitted entry in the discussion history for the requirement, rather than just in the typing area.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ReqView graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ReqView application window being used, rather than a text editor modifying JSON files.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible running scripts or commands to directly edit the project files.

integrity.description: The comment was added through genuine user interaction with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The progression of screenshots shows the natural flow of opening panels, typing, and submitting the comment within the app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target document is 'SRS'. The exact comment text that must be added is: 'Acceptance criteria are missing for this requirement. The testing team needs measurable pass/fail conditions before this can be approved. Please update by end of sprint 12.' The comment must be added to the top-level requirement's Discussion/Comment panel within the ReqView application.
